creator: odinh
ingredients_text:
NOODLE (73.4%) {WHEAT FLOUR (GLUTEN), MODIFIED STARCH (TAPIOCA), PALM OIL, WHEAT GLUTEN, SALT, EMULSIFIERS (E 422, E 322 (SOY)), THICKENER(E 412), ACIDITY REGULATORS (E 501, E 500, E339, E330), ANTIOXIDANT(E 306), GREEN TEA FLAVOUR, COLOUR(E 101)}.

LIQUID SAUCE(23.9 %) {WATER, FLAVOURINGS WITH CHICKEN FLAVOURS (WHEAT, GLUTEN, SOY, CELERY), SOY SAUCE(WATER, SOYBEAN, WHEAT (GLUTEN), SALT, FRUCTOSE, FLAVOUR ENHANCER (E 635), GARLIC, FLAVOURS, ACIDITY REGULATOR(E 270), SWEETENER(E 960)), SUGAR, FLAVOURS(SOY), SOYBEAN OIL, HABANERO PEPPER SEASONING (CONTAINS ANTI-CAKING AGENT (E 551), FLAVOUR ENHANCER(E 631, E 627), COLOUR(E 160c) (SOY)), CHILI PEPPER SEASONING (SOY), ONION, GARLIC, THICKENER (E 1420), COLOUR (E 160C), CHILI, CHILI PEPPER EXTRACT, BLACK PEPPER POWDER, CURRY SEASONING (CONTAINS FLAVOUR ENHANCER (E 635)), ACIDITY REGULATOR (E 270)}.

SOUP POWDER(2.7 %) {FLAVOURS(SOY), ROASTED _SESAME_, ROASTED LAVER}.
